info.name: E-Commerce API — Testing Practice
info.description:
Full-featured e-commerce API for testing practice. Covers auth, CRUD, pagination, ETag/304, fault simulation, idempotency, BOLA/IDOR, rate limiting, RFC 7807 errors, and order state machines.

**Quick Start**
1. Import this collection + the environment file
2. Select the `E-Commerce API` environment
3. Run `Seed > Reset — full seed` to restore clean data
4. Run `Auth > Login as user` and `Auth > Login as admin` to populate tokens

**Seeded credentials**
| Role  | Email           | Password  |
|-------|-----------------|----------|
| admin | admin@test.com  | Admin123! |
| user  | user@test.com   | User123!  |
| user  | user2@test.com  | User123!  |

exec: // Global: assert X-Request-Id on every response

variable.description: Switch to http://localhost:3000/v1 for local dev
Set by Login as user / Register

request.description: Seeds only 3 users. No products or categories. Useful for empty-catalogue edge case tests.
Creates a new account. Role is always forced to 'user' regardless of what role is passed in the body (mass assignment protection).

exec: pm.test('Role forced to user — mass assignment protection', function () {

request.description: Passes role:admin in body. Security test: role must be silently ignored and set to 'user'.
